description: Eight official GAIA YouTube video/channel cases.

cases.prompt: In the video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L1vXCYZAYYM, what is the highest number of bird species to be on camera simultaneously?
cases.goal: Return the shortest correct final answer

cases.prompt: Assuming scientists in the famous youtube video The Thinking Machine (Artificial Intelligence in the 1960s) were interviewed the same year, what is the name of the scientist predicting the sooner thinking machines or robots? Answer using the format First name Last name
cases.goal: Return the shortest correct final answer

cases.prompt: What is the maximum length in meters of #9 in the first National Geographic short on YouTube that was ever released according to the Monterey Bay Aquarium website? Just give the number.
cases.goal: Return the shortest correct final answer

cases.prompt:
Examine the video at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1htKBjuUWec.

What does Teal'c say in response to the question "Isn't that hot?"
cases.goal: Return the shortest correct final answer

cases.prompt: The YouTube channel Game Grumps began a Let’s Play of the game Sonic the Hedgehog (2006) in the year 2012. Thirty seconds into the first episode, a phrase is shown on the screen in white letters on a red background. How many times does the letter "E" appear in this phrase?
cases.goal: Return the shortest correct final answer

cases.prompt: On the BBC Earth YouTube video of the Top 5 Silliest Animal Moments, what species of bird is featured?
cases.goal: Return the shortest correct final answer

cases.prompt: In the YouTube 360 VR video from March 2018 narrated by the voice actor of Lord of the Rings' Gollum, what number was mentioned by the narrator directly after dinosaurs were first shown in the video?
cases.goal: Return the shortest correct final answer

cases.prompt: At the two-minute mark in the YouTube video uploaded by the channel “GameGrumps” on May 14, 2017 as part of their playthrough of the game Mario Kart 8 Deluxe, the shows’ hosts are competing on one of the game’s racetracks. What was the world record time for that track in the game’s 150cc mode as of June 7, 2023? Express your answer in minutes and seconds, rounding the seconds to the nearest hundredth, e.g. 1:01.001.
cases.goal: Return the shortest correct final answer
